headline: setup-toolkit-diagnose: portable regex extraction for macOS

bullets: `setup-toolkit-diagnose.sh` no longer uses `grep -oP` (PCRE). On macOS, BSD `grep` rejects `-P` and the diagnostic was emitting `grep: invalid option -- P` while letting downstream comparisons run vacuously over empty data — a silent-correctness bug that hid orphan/stale-ref findings, not just noise.

Replaced 6 PCRE call sites with portable `sed -nE` / `grep -oE` equivalents. Linux behavior is unchanged; macOS users should now see clean output and trustworthy results from `bash .claude/scripts/setup-toolkit-diagnose.sh`.
